fault_hypothesis: The function never sorts the buckets before returning them. The docstring promises sorted output per shard, but line 65 returns `buckets` without any `sort()` call on each bucket.

spec.expr: all(bucket == sorted(bucket) for bucket in buckets__1)

constraints.intent: Each bucket in the returned list must be in sorted order before returning.

spec.expr: all(len(b) == 0 or True for b in buckets__1)

constraints.intent: After each iteration, buckets exist and have the right count (placeholder to anchor loop; real check: no bucket exceeds total keys so far).

spec.expr: len(buckets__1) == shards and all(b == [] for b in buckets__1)

constraints.intent: Immediately after bucket initialisation, every bucket must be empty and count must equal shards.

spec.expr: all(__cbfl_result[i] == sorted(__cbfl_result[i]) for i in range(len(__cbfl_result)))

constraints.intent: Every returned bucket must be sorted; failing tests violate this.
